\tzpentry{ID3296}{Propulsive Field Strength Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3296 introduces Propulsive Field Strength Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathbf{F}_{propulsive} \sim \frac{d}{dt} \int_V \mathbf{r} \times ( \mathbf{E} \times \mathbf{B}) dV \end{equation}
